WHO ARE THESE AWEFULL PEOPLE?

We are a group of people who have been deeply impacted by the experiences of awe, connection, reflection and traveling. Through our work, we seek to expand these experiences and their positive effects.

Glenn Astofi

Seasoned entrepreneur and executive with a track record of success across diverse industries, including technology, financial services, brick and mortar and online retail. He has held senior leadership roles in startups and large public companies, specializing in finance, business strategy, and innovation-driven capital fundraising.

Emiliano Sigales

Multidisciplinary entrepreneur and podcaster passionate about transforming visionary ideas into real projects. Emiliano develops digital and tech-driven business solutions, blending business development, marketing, and systems engineering with a global outlook and curiosity for science, philosophy, and culture. He finds awe in adventures backpacking and in silent moments drinking coffee.

Steve Scanlon

Steve Scanlon is the Founder and CEO of Rewire, Inc., a company dedicated to teaching how the human mind shapes the path to success. Steve has over 20,000 hours helping leaders & teams understand how real, sustainable change happens from the inside out. Steve is a certified behavioral analyst in DiSC and Myers-Briggs, the author of "Reality and Hope" and "Still the Lizard", and a self-proclaimed neuroscience geek. He lives in Oregon with his family, dogs, and lizard, and finds awe on trails, golf courses, and in the great outdoors.
